species: Bootlegger and Nxf3 as novel components of the piRNA precursor processing pathway required for transposon silencing in the fly germline.
tissue: CG13741 is expressed predominantly in ovaries.
cell_type: Nxf3 was required only in germ cells.
sample_source: we performed RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) from ovaries of mutant flies...
age: ovaries from ∼100 w1118 or nxf3mut flies (3–5 d old) were dissected...
sex: CG13741 and nxf3 mutants were female sterile...
strain: Control w1118 flies were a gift from the University of Cambridge Department of Genetics Fly Facility.
